title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Answers to common ZXSpace questions about release status, controls, solo play, coins, power-ups, achievements, and leaderboards.
summary: Quick ZXSpace answers for release-ready player support.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending ZXSpace FAQ image
sourceNotes: FAQ answers are based on current ZXSpace source, central documentation, and website metadata.
Public status is Coming Soon. Final App Store approval status, public URL, and multiplayer release behavior are To Verify.

sections.heading: FAQ overview
paragraphs: This page collects release-ready answers for the most common ZXSpace support questions.
Approval-dependent App Store details should be checked again once Apple delivery and review are complete.

faq.question: Is ZXSpace live on the App Store?
faq.answer: No. ZXSpace is Coming Soon, and the final App Store approval status and public URL are To Verify.

faq.question: What is the verified gameplay mode?
faq.answer: The verified documented mode is Solo city-defence formation shooting. Public multiplayer behavior is To Verify before final release copy.

faq.question: How do controls work?
faq.answer: Move the cannon with touch-and-drag horizontal movement. The cannon fires automatically during play.

faq.question: Does ZXSpace use BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXSpace uses the shared ZX Series wallet model and awards coins through wave completion and progression systems.

faq.question: What power-ups are in the current source?
faq.answer: Current source includes Double Laser and Shield Repair drops.
